title: Alpha Note quality standard
summary: Accurate, concise, and action-oriented notes; include who/what/when.
content: Alpha notes must include the call reason, steps taken, outcomes, and next steps. Avoid PII.

title: Denials: fair handling and escalation
summary: Use Observe AI style; apply guardrails; escalate when appropriate.
content: Explain reason plainly. Offer alternatives (repair/upgrade). Escalate per policy if criteria met.
